chain.thought: Explanation: Rows 1–11 are tablets; none are both “in the text” (have a narrative) and “not in it” (lack narrative or lack tablet status) at the same time. Row 12 has narrative but is not a tablet. Therefore, no tablet satisfies both conditions simultaneously.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
The column "narrative" indicates whether a tablet is "in a text" (has a verse range) or "not in it" (marked "no narrative"). No tablet simultaneously has both a narrative range and "no narrative." Therefore, the number of tablets that are in a text and not in it at the same time is 0.
